Challenge_WindowWasher_desc: The world ended while you were at work. You're stuck on a scaffold, outside a skyscraper. Get in. Survive. <LINE> <LINE> Normal mode: Apocalypse world settings, no zombie respawn.
Challenge_WindowWasherHC_desc: The world ended while you were at work. You're stuck on a scaffold, outside a skyscraper. Get in. Survive. <LINE> <LINE> Hardcore mode: 'Extinction' world settings — nocturnal sprinters, tough zombies, scarce loot, and zombies respawn.
